initiatives.name: Tucson Food Share
initiatives.description: A mutual aid organization providing food and resources to the Tucson community through food distributions and community support networks.

initiatives.name: Revolutionary Grounds
initiatives.description: A radical bookstore and community space fostering mutual aid, political education, and solidarity through literature, events, and organizing. They provide a hub for community building, resource sharing, and collective action in Tucson.

initiatives.name: Tucson Tenants Union
initiatives.description: We are a tenant-led union fighting for safe and secure housing in southern Arizona

initiatives.name: Tucson Mesh
initiatives.description: An anti-capitalist community-controlled wireless internet network providing sliding-scale and low-cost internet access. They build community power through collective infrastructure, tech education, and mutual aid while ensuring equitable access to vital internet services without corporate surveillance or data collection.

initiatives.name: Unhoused Neighbors
initiatives.description: We are a non-profit, mutual aid organization that works to support and elevate awareness for our local houseless communities.

initiatives.name: Tucson Anti-War Committee
initiatives.description: Stand with Palestine. End U.S. Aid to Israel. Arms Embargo on Israel Now.

initiatives.name: Amphi Liberation Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: Community care to the Amphi Neighborhood and surrounding area. Occupying space in so-called Tucson.

initiatives.name: Tucson Anti-Repression
initiatives.description: Working to contribute to cultures of resilience against state repression in southern so-called Arizona.

initiatives.name: Tucson Anti-Repression
initiatives.description: A grassroots collective fostering mutual aid and community defense through solidarity networks and direct support in Tucson. They coordinate legal support, resource sharing, and community care initiatives while building power through collective action and creating spaces for resistance and community protection.

initiatives.name: Abortion Access in Tucson
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering reproductive healthcare access through direct support and community care in Tucson. They coordinate abortion access, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through reproductive justice organizing and creating pathways for accessible healthcare.

initiatives.name: Tucson Coalition for Palestine
initiatives.description: Coalition of organizations and individuals in Tucson who are coming together in support of a free Palestine

initiatives.name: Community Care Tucson
initiatives.description: Mutual aid project providing resources to unsheltered/displaced folks.

initiatives.name: Sex Workers Outreach Project Tucson
initiatives.description: Sex worker solidarity and organizers of The Sex Work Arts Festival.

initiatives.name: Thompson House Tucson
initiatives.description: Thompson House is a revolutionary socialist, mutual aid collective based in Tucson, AZ that aims to support housing for trans and gender non-conforming young people (18-24) and elders (60+).

initiatives.name: Church of Safe Injection Tucson
initiatives.description: The Church of Safe Injection Tucson (CoSIT) believes in evidence-based harm reduction strategies such as needle exchanges, overdose prevention centers, and sensible drug policy and education.

initiatives.name: After School Anarchy
initiatives.description: a direct action collective. bipoc/queer/youth organized. unceded Tohono O'odham land

initiatives.name: Amphi Liberation Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: Providing community care to the Amphi Neighborhood and surrounding area.

initiatives.name: Community on Wheels
initiatives.description: Mobile mutual aid project providing essential items & resources to unsheltered/street based folks.

initiatives.name: Autonomy Tucson
initiatives.description: From the left not of the left. Southern AZ

initiatives.name: Organize Tucson
initiatives.description: We're a hub to share protest and community building events in the Tucson area.

initiatives.name: Tucson Pink Pistols
initiatives.description: Tucson Chapter of Pink Pistols national LGBT firearms organization.

initiatives.name: Take Action Tucson
initiatives.description: Find local events and connect with fellow Tucsonans working to save democracy.

initiatives.name: Mobilize Tucson
initiatives.description: We are devoted to uniting Tucson in the fight to end tyranny in our government, uphold our constitution and resist fascism through unifying Tucson's local organizations, communities and local organizers under one movement.
